modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Login page refreshes without error after entering credentials.

full_description_text: User attempts to log into the SNAP application. After entering their username and password, the screen blinks. The login page does not display any error messages. Instead, it clears the input fields and reverts to the default "Sign in" prompt. This behavior occurs consistently during the login process.
short_description: Login page refreshes without error after entering credentials.
description: User attempts to log into the SNAP application. After entering their username and password, the screen blinks. The login page does not display any error messages. Instead, it clears the input fields and reverts to the default "Sign in" prompt. This behavior occurs consistently during the login process.
